models.translationConfig: The user's translation preferences — primary, parallels, and display toggles.
models.aiConfig: AI provider configuration — provider, API key, model, connection status.
models.aiProvider: An available AI provider with name and requirements.
models.studyPreferences: Commentary, source tier, Daily Bread, font size, and theme preferences.
models.backupInfo: Current backup status, file size, auto-backup settings.

relationships: StudyPreferences controls display across Reader, Commentary, and Daily Bread

aiProviders.name: Anthropic
aiProviders.note: Claude models. Requires API key from console.anthropic.com

aiProviders.name: Google
aiProviders.note: Gemini models. Requires API key from aistudio.google.com

aiProviders.name: OpenAI
aiProviders.note: GPT models. Requires API key from platform.openai.com

aiProviders.name: Ollama
aiProviders.note: Local models. Requires Ollama running on your network

aiProviders.name: Custom
aiProviders.note: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Requires URL and API key
